title: Video on Ronan's round Ireland ride premiering today
tags: The ‘why’ behind my circumnavigation of Ireland helped me find the ‘how’ to finishI rode 3,100 km in under 10 days, largely unsupported, on a restricted diet and through intense storms and debilitating injuries, but thanks to a greater purpose I never once wavered.Escape CollectiveRonan Mc Laughlin;YouTube at 7pm BST tonight;fundraising page to help cover the cost of Sophia’s treatment;Bikepacking x aero nerd: The no-added-drag approach to a circumnavigation bike buildThe bike, drag-reducing storage system, and kit that carried me 3,000+ km around Ireland.Escape CollectiveRonan Mc Laughlin
